reportSubtitle: Static Wins, Infrastructure Week, Secondary Markets Launch
summary:
Slower week on lead volume (1 vs 4 last week), but a productive one for infrastructure. We confirmed Static as the winning creative, made several backend improvements, and launched secondary markets.

Meta Ads: $335.86 total spend — Static delivered 1 lead at $170.76, Video spent $165.10 with 0 leads. We removed Premiere/After Effects from Video targeting per Khachatur's feedback to focus on pre-production editors. The new AU/DE/FR secondary market ad set launched Apr 4 at $10/day.

Site activity (last 7 days): 29 calendar opens from 20 unique visitors, but only 1 confirmed booking. That's an 8.5% click rate on Book a Demo — which is strong for cold traffic — but a 95% drop-off between opening the calendar and actually booking. The demo scheduling step is where we're losing people. 15 plan signup clicks on the self-serve side.

Infrastructure: Installed GTM + Sailfish on the funnel site, added team-size branching to email automation, cleaned lookalike audience CSV, deployed improved event tracking, launched secondary markets.

metrics.label: Ad Spend
metrics.note: Static $170.76 + Video $165.10. Down from $362 last week.

metrics.label: Leads (Demo Bookings)
metrics.note: Down from 4 last week. Static: 1 lead. Video: 0 leads.

metrics.label: Calendar Opens
metrics.note: 8.5% of unique visits clicked Book a Demo — strong interest signal for cold traffic.

metrics.label: Signup Clicks
metrics.note: People clicking plan signup buttons. Now that GTM is installed, we can start tracking whether these complete signup.

steps.label: Signup Completed
steps.note: GTM just installed — data coming next week

charts.title: Ad Set Performance — This Week (Mar 28 – Apr 3)

findings.title: Strong Demo Interest, Weak Booking Follow-Through
findings.description: 20 unique visitors (8.5%) clicked Book a Demo, but only 1 actually completed a booking on the calendar page. Something to keep watching.

findings.title: Static Creative Seeming like the Winner
findings.description: This week: Static 1 lead at $170.76, Video 0 leads at $165.10. Cumulative: Static 3 leads at $136 CPL, Video 2 leads at $324 CPL. Static is 2.4x more cost-efficient.

findings.title: Self-Serve Path Showing Steady Volume
findings.description: 15 plan signup clicks (6.4% of visitors) on Basic/Creator/Pro buttons. With GTM + Sailfish now installed, we'll be able to see next week whether these clicks are converting to actual signups.

actions.title: Removed Premiere & After Effects from Video Targeting
actions.description: Per Khachatur's feedback, focusing more on pre-production editors.

actions.title: Launched AU/DE/FR Secondary Market Ad Set
actions.description: Static + Video creative at $10/day. Testing Australia, Germany, France.

actions.title: Installed GTM Tag & Sailfish Script on Funnel Site
actions.description: GTM container added to the Next.js marketing site. Will track actual signups on finalbitai.com.

actions.title: Cleaned Lookalike Audience CSV
actions.description: 16 production contacts extracted from Anna's spreadsheet. Too small — need 50-100+ for quality lookalike.

actions.title: Added Team Size Branch to Email Automation
actions.description: 24hr reminder and reschedule emails now branch on team size. 5+ teams get screenplay request, smaller teams get simpler reminder.

actions.title: Deployed Improved Event Tracking
actions.description: New PricingLink component fires pricing_viewed event on View Pricing buttons. Analytics cleanup — removed unused events, organized around actual conversion paths.

nextSteps: Verify GTM + Sailfish tags firing — watch for signup_completed events next week
Ask Anna for 50-100+ contacts for proper lookalike audience
